summary: Tested Flavors of Samundri full-stack app. All 9 backend pytest tests pass (menu list/filters/categories, orders create+empty 400+list sorted, contact create+list). Frontend: home hero+tagline, featured cards (5), all nav links, menu category tabs (6) + filter, add-to-cart, cart badge, cart drawer with items and +/- and remove, footer phone/address all work. Order page renders cart and form correctly and form fields have testids, but Place Order button is missing data-testid='order-submit' (selector timeout), so automated submit could not be invoked. Order item rows on Order page also missing data-testid='order-item-*'. Contact form and mobile menu test were blocked by the order test failure but UI screenshots show pages render fine.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='order-submit' attribute. Button renders and is clickable visually but selector [data-testid='order-submit'] never resolves (30s Playwright timeout). Blocks automated checkout test.
Missing data-testid='order-item-*' on cart line items in Order.jsx. Rows render correctly (Chicken Biryani Rs 450 visible) but cannot be selected programmatically.

Duplicate data-testid='contact-phone' is used on BOTH the contact info anchor (<a href='tel:...'>) and the form input field. Causes ambiguous selectors; tests must scope to 'input[data-testid=contact-phone]'. Recommend renaming the link testid (e.g., contact-phone-link) vs form testid (contact-phone-input).

action_items: Add data-testid='order-submit' to the Place Order <button> in /app/frontend/src/pages/Order.jsx
Add data-testid={`order-item-${item.id}`} to each cart line in Order.jsx (also order-success on success screen if missing)
Resolve duplicate data-testid='contact-phone' in /app/frontend/src/pages/Contact.jsx (rename anchor vs input)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handler (non-blocking).

list_orders/list_contact_messages parse created_at from isoformat back to datetime - works but storing as ISO string while Order model expects datetime is fragile; consider storing native datetime in Mongo.
CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' is invalid per CORS spec (browsers will reject). Set explicit origins via CORS_ORIGINS env or set allow_credentials=False.
No rate limiting / size limits on POST /api/orders or /api/contact - potential abuse vector.
Frontend Contact.jsx reuses same data-testid for tel link and input field (test ambiguity).

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (verified core flows; order submit & contact submit & mobile menu not auto-verified due to missing testid blocking script)

seed_data_creation: Created test orders/contact messages prefixed TEST_ via API and UI tests (cleanup not implemented - low volume).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully passing. After main agent adds data-testid='order-submit', 'order-item-*', and disambiguates contact-phone testids, retest: (1) place order end-to-end and verify [data-testid='order-success'] visible with order id, (2) contact form submit shows sonner toast, (3) mobile menu toggle opens [data-testid='mobile-nav']. Use SPA navigation (click nav links) rather than page.goto to preserve cart localStorage between Menu->Order pages. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
rca of the issue: Order submit timeout caused by missing data-testid attribute on the Place Order button in Order.jsx. Button is visually rendered & functional (screenshot confirms) but Playwright cannot locate it. Reproduction: visit /menu, add item, navigate to /order, attempt page.click('[data-testid=order-submit]') -> 30s timeout. Mitigation: add data-testid='order-submit' to the Place Order button element.
